original_prompt: row of 8 different cannabis nutrient bottles crowded on a dark shelf, different heights colors and labels, nutrient solution visible through glass, blurred grow tent visible in background bokeh, cinematic documentary photography, dark moody atmosphere, shallow depth of field, teal LED accent lighting, near-black background, desaturated muted color grade with slightly lifted shadows, Sony A7S III 85mm f/1.4 lens, photorealistic, no text no labels no watermarks no bright studio lighting
revised_prompt: Create a photorealistic image featuring a dark, moody atmosphere with a row of 8 different cannabis nutrient bottles of varying heights, colors, and labels on a near-black shelf. Some nutrient solution should be visible through the glass bottles. The background should be subtly blurred and hint at a grow tent with teal LED accent lighting enhancing the bokeh effect. Ensure a shallow depth of field and apply a desaturated, muted color grade with slightly lifted shadows, reminiscent of a cinematic documentary style. No text, labels, watermarks or bright studio lighting should be present. This constitutes the view from an 85mm f/1.4 lens on a Sony A7S III camera.
